A) Such placentation seen in Argemone
B) The placenta is axial and the ovules are
attached to it in an unilocular ovary
C) Such placentation seen in china rose
D) The placenta is axial and the ovules are
attached to it in multilocular ovary as
in Dianthus
116. Match the column I and column II
Pg. 75, E|

[1 [Parietal [a [Pea |
[2 [Axle |b [Lemon |
[4 [Basal ~~ |d [Primrose |

C)l-e,2-d,3-a,4-¢,5-b

117. Choose the correct statement — (Pg. 75, M)
A) Unilocular ovary becomes two
chambered due to the formation of
false septum as in mustard
B) In Argemone ovary is two chambered
due to the formation of true septum
C) Axile placentation found in
multilocular ovary as in tomato
D) A & C both
118. Dianthus have — (Pg. 75, E
L JN
@o
119. In Marigold —- (Pg. 75, E)
A) Same placentation found in sunflower
B) Placenta develop at base of ovary
C) Single ovule is attached to ovary
D) All of those
